# runtime-benchmark-plan-tui-replay

## Stack
JSON fixture

## Test Command
test_cmd: grep -q "src/tui/review_panel.rs" .obstral/tui_replay.json

## Development Rules
- Read `.obstral/tui_replay.json` before editing it.
- Make the smallest replay-spec update that satisfies the approved Observer benchmark plan.
- Run the configured grep command before calling done.
